temporal_description: This is a static, high-angle shot of a formal meeting in progress. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, providing a wide, overhead view of the entire scene. The setting appears to be a modern office or control room. The room has a checkered black and white floor. In the center of the frame, a long, dark grey conference table is arranged with several men in business attire. Four men are seated around the table, while another man stands at the head of the table, addressing them. The men at the table are looking towards the standing man. The men at the table are all wearing light-colored, short-sleeved collared shirts, suggesting a uniform. The standing man is dressed in a white shirt and a dark tie. On the table, there are papers, mugs, and a black object that resembles a hat or a piece of equipment. To the left, a television monitor on a stand displays a blue and white graphic. In the background, a staircase is visible, and through a large glass partition on the right, other people can be seen working at desks in an adjacent area. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with two Chinese characters, "风行网". The audio consists of a single, sharp sound effect. It begins with a low, scraping noise, like a chair being moved across a hard floor, which is immediately followed by a solid, definitive click, as if an object has been placed firmly on a surface. The overall atmosphere is quiet and professional.
